name: GH_SliderRailDisplay
summary: Enumerates the possible slider rail displays.

enum_values.name: Simple
enum_values.summary: A rail consisting of a single line is drawn.

enum_values.name: Etched
enum_values.summary: A rail consisting of an etched line is drawn.

enum_values.name: Filled
enum_values.summary: A thick rail with a filled out left portion is drawn.
